aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite this business due to missing structured data and conversational content, despite decent NAP consistency.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with common HVAC questions and answers

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and significantly limiting local search visibility.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile not set up
Lack of GBP photos, posts, and Q&A engagement

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms
Expand NAP listings to include more local directories

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC services

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less relevant to AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries where AI assistants seek detailed, structured information.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness schema to provide AI with essential business details.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating in-depth content on HVAC topics and obtaining certifications to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your business the top answer for HVAC queries.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI assistant searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Your Google Business Profile is not found, and your site lacks essential schema markup for AI recognition.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach integrates structured data, GBP optimization, and conversational content to make your business the go-to HVAC expert for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential customers—act now to stay competitive.

email_subject_line: Maximize Your AI Visibility: Boost Your HVAC Business with Our AEO Strategy
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to improve your AI-driven visibility and attract more HVAC leads.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your site for AI and boost your lead generation.
